creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
Here are updates for the following ports:

port                             | old version | new version
---------------------------------+-------------+-------------
deskutils/tomboy                 |      0.12.2 |      0.14.2
x11-toolkits/gnome-desktop-sharp |      2.24.0 |      2.36.0
x11-toolkits/gnome-sharp20       |      2.24.0 |      2.24.1

and two new ports:

port         | version
-------------+---------
www/xsp      |     2.4
www/mod_mono |     2.4

Fix: diff -ruN /var/cache/portshaker/freebsd/x11-toolkits/gnome-sharp20/Makefile /tmp/gnome-sharp20/Makefile
--- /var/cache/portshaker/freebsd/x11-toolkits/gnome-sharp20/Makefile	2009-06-03 07:14:48.000000000 +0200
+++ /tmp/gnome-sharp20/Makefile	2009-04-18 21:35:44.620462000 +0200
@@ -2,13 +2,12 @@
 # Date created:         		20061025
 # Whom:                 		Tom McLaughlin <tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/x11-toolkits/gnome-sharp20/Makefile,v 1.9 2009/06/03 05:14:48 marcus Exp $

 #   $Id: Makefile,v 1.3 2007/10/02 03:37:51 killfill Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gnome-sharp
-PORTVERSION=	2.24.0
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	2.24.1
 CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits
 MASTER_SITES=	GNOME

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	mod_mono
#	mod_mono/files
#	mod_mono/files/patch-Makefile.in
#	mod_mono/files/patch-src_Makefile.in
#	mod_mono/files/patch-src_mod__mono.c
#	mod_mono/pkg-descr
#	mod_mono/distinfo
#	mod_mono/pkg-plist
#	mod_mono/Makefile
#
echo c - mod_mono
mkdir -p mod_mono > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - mod_mono/files
mkdir -p mod_mono/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mod_mono/files/patch-Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/files/patch-Makefile.in << '94d218557d3b45a917ea86b4b4d5b254'
X--- Makefile.in.orig	Thu Sep 22 14:04:39 2005
X+++ Makefile.in	Sun Oct  2 20:24:15 2005
X@@ -192,7 +192,7 @@
X # Current spec file is obsolete
X #	     packaging/redhat/mod_mono.spec \
X #	     packaging/redhat/mono.conf
X-modmonoconfdir = $(APXS_SYSCONFDIR)
X+modmonoconfdir = %%MOD_MONOCONFDIR%%
X modmonoconf_DATA = mod_mono.conf
X all: all-recursive
X 
94d218557d3b45a917ea86b4b4d5b254
echo x - mod_mono/files/patch-src_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/files/patch-src_Makefile.in << '14b7259cb06b9e7bb586a87c84d66724'
X--- src/Makefile.in.orig	Thu Sep 22 14:04:38 2005
X+++ src/Makefile.in	Sat Oct 22 18:28:32 2005
X@@ -468,8 +468,8 @@
X 
X install: $(lib_LTLIBRARIES)
X 	$(mkinstalldirs) "$(DESTDIR)$(APXS_LIBEXECDIR)"
X-@APACHE2_TRUE@	$(APXS) -S LIBEXECDIR="$(DESTDIR)$(APXS_LIBEXECDIR)" -i -n mono mod_mono.la
X-@APACHE2_FALSE@	$(APXS) -S LIBEXECDIR="$(DESTDIR)$(APXS_LIBEXECDIR)" -i -n mono .libs/mod_mono.so
X+#@APACHE2_TRUE@	$(APXS) -S LIBEXECDIR="$(DESTDIR)$(APXS_LIBEXECDIR)" -i -n mono mod_mono.la
X+	$(APXS) -S LIBEXECDIR="$(DESTDIR)$(APXS_LIBEXECDIR)" -i -n mono .libs/mod_mono.so
X # Tell versions [3.59,3.63) of GNU make to not export all variables.
X # Otherwise a system limit (for SysV at least) may be exceeded.
X .NOEXPORT:
14b7259cb06b9e7bb586a87c84d66724
echo x - mod_mono/files/patch-src_mod__mono.c
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/files/patch-src_mod__mono.c << '63de75da016909a9d9fbf14995ff686d'
X
X$FreeBSD$
X
X--- src/mod_mono.c.orig
X+++ src/mod_mono.c
X@@ -1765,8 +1765,12 @@
X 
X 	/* Unblock signals Mono uses: see bug #472732 */
X 	sigemptyset (&sigset);
X+#if defined SIGPWR
X 	sigaddset (&sigset, SIGPWR);
X+#endif /* def SIGPWR */
X+#if defined SIGXCPU
X 	sigaddset (&sigset, SIGXCPU);
X+#endif /* def SIGXCPU */
X 	sigaddset (&sigset, 33);
X 	sigaddset (&sigset, 35);
X 	sigprocmask (SIG_UNBLOCK, &sigset, NULL);
63de75da016909a9d9fbf14995ff686d
echo x - mod_mono/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/pkg-descr << '43561c2fd73155fc85581831304917b2'
XAn Apache module that ties Mono's XSP and Apache together.
X
XWWW: http://www.mono-project.com
43561c2fd73155fc85581831304917b2
echo x - mod_mono/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/distinfo << 'f9b3661778386ae972a42565f0df183a'
XMD5 (mod_mono-2.4.tar.bz2) = 4dc8e93baa22211e858bff84d3ffabd4
XSHA256 (mod_mono-2.4.tar.bz2) = 10c1c8d339bc35d729d257801f6d235a71ffb23989ff8802646416fc102cc991
XSIZE (mod_mono-2.4.tar.bz2) = 268525
f9b3661778386ae972a42565f0df183a
echo x - mod_mono/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/pkg-plist << 'f4ddc516d4d71538cc2db7cf2737ad25'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
X%%MOD_MONOCONFDIR%%/mod_mono.conf
X%%APACHEMODDIR%%/mod_mono.so
f4ddc516d4d71538cc2db7cf2737ad25
echo x - mod_mono/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >mod_mono/Makefile << '3464df44259e68d79706fd47c1bcf342'
X# New ports collection makefile for:		mod_mono
X# Date created:					20040828
X# Whom:				Tom McLaughlin <tmclaugh@sdf.lonestar.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#   $Id: Makefile,v 1.39 2007/12/13 19:35:47 killfill Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	mod_mono
XPORTVERSION=	2.4
XCATEGORIES=	www
XMASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.novell.com/pub/mono/sources/${PORTNAME}/
X
XMAINTAINER=	mono@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=	Apache module for serving ASP.NET applications
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	apr-1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/apr
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	mono:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono \
X		xsp:${PORTSDIR}/www/xsp
XRUN_DEPENDS=	mono:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono \
X		xsp:${PORTSDIR}/www/xsp
X
XUSE_APACHE=	2.0+
XUSE_BZIP2=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	gnometarget
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:15
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--man=${PREFIX}/man
X
XMAN8=		mod_mono.8
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.if ${APACHE_VERSION} == 13
XMOD_MONOCONFDIR=${APACHEETCDIR}
X.else
XMOD_MONOCONFDIR=${APACHEETCDIR}/Includes
X.endif
X
XPLIST_SUB+= MOD_MONOCONFDIR=${MOD_MONOCONFDIR}
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|%%MOD_MONOCONFDIR%%|${PREFIX}/${MOD_MONOCONFDIR}|g' \
X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
X
X.include "${.CURDIR}/../../lang/mono/bsd.mono.mk"
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
3464df44259e68d79706fd47c1bcf342
exit
--- mod_mono.sh ends here ---
